title: LangGraph Extension HTTP Driver and HITL Resume Integration

validation_gates.detail: npm run compile succeeded in vscode-ext
python scripts/test_langgraph_e2e.py confirmed one run advances only one session
python scripts/test_langgraph_http_smoke.py confirmed HTTP start path with approval_required=false
python scripts/test_langgraph_hitl_http.py confirmed real HTTP approve/reject branches
npm run smoke:session12 confirmed extension refresh/read path and approve/reject command chain against real LangGraph server

extension_capabilities.name: langgraph_inspect_state
extension_capabilities.detail: Reads /threads/{thread_id}/state and maps runtime metadata into DriverResult

extension_capabilities.name: langgraph_resume_approve_reject
extension_capabilities.detail: Uses /runs/{run_id}/resume when available and falls back to /threads/{thread_id}/runs + command.resume

extension_capabilities.name: interrupted_runtime_mapping
extension_capabilities.detail: Maps thread state interrupt tasks to runtime run_status=interrupted

extension_capabilities.name: dashboard_review_actions
extension_capabilities.detail: Shows approve/reject actions when runtime run_status=interrupted
